en_title: Warframe Dev Says 'No One Is Celebrating' as Destiny 2 Support Comes to a 'Heartbreaking' End
cn_title: 《星际战甲》开发者谈《命运2》终止：无人庆祝
subtitle: 无人庆祝，唯有心碎
opus_summary: Megan Everett称索尼叫停《命运2》支持令人心碎，无人庆祝。她认为竞争有益，《命运》的存在助推了《星际战甲》成长，并惋惜玩家支持姗姗来迟。

paragraphs.en: Warframe community director and live ops lead Megan Everett has said that "no one is celebrating" the "heartbreaking" news that Sony pulled the plug on Destiny 2 support.
paragraphs.cn: Warframe社区总监兼实时运营主管Megan Everett表示，对于索尼终止《命运2》支持这一「令人心碎」的消息，「没人庆祝」。

paragraphs.en: Both sci-fi shooters have had just enough in common to keep them in the same conversation for more than a decade. It's a friendly competition that carried developers Digital Extremes and Bungie from the 2010s into the 2020s but, when the latter announced it had shuttered all plans for future updates in May , both communities largely decided to lay down arms .
paragraphs.cn: 两作都是科幻射击游戏，共性足够让它们在十余年间一直被放在一起比较。这是一场友好的竞争，带着开发商Digital Extremes和Bungie从2010年代走进2020年代，但当后者在5月宣布终止所有未来更新计划时，双方社区大体上都选择了放下武器。

paragraphs.en: "Truthfully, it's heartbreaking. It's earth-shattering," she said. "I never thought I'd ever see the day where I'd read an article from Bungie about Destiny 2 essentially shutting down."
paragraphs.cn: 「说实话，这让人心碎，这让人震惊，」她说，「我从没想过会看到Bungie发出《命运2》实质上停服的文章。」

paragraphs.en: "I'm speaking personally, but I know people would echo it as well. No one is celebrating the fact that this has happened to Destiny, and its players and that story. I know that people have obviously compared us in terms of being 'direct competitors' and stuff like that. But I think a game is healthy when you have competitors, and [Destiny's developers] have done such an amazing job at trying to grow that story regardless of whatever situation they were in."
paragraphs.cn: 「我只是代表个人，但我知道其他人也会共鸣。对于《命运》及其玩家和这个故事所遭遇的一切，没人庆祝。我知道人们显然把我们看作‘直接竞争对手’之类的。但我认为有竞争对手的游戏生态才是健康的，而且《命运》的开发者们不管处于什么情况，都在努力拓展那个故事，做得非常出色。」

paragraphs.en: The end of Destiny 2 came as a shock to everyone – Bungie included. After the announcement that support was winding down, Forbes reported that much of the studio's staff was unaware of plans to . It means development on more Destiny content had continued even after the decision was made. The final update, Monument of Triumph , was launched on June 9.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运2》的终结让所有人震惊——包括Bungie在内。在宣布逐步终止支持后，《福布斯》报道称该工作室大部分员工并不知情。这意味着在做决定后，更多《命运》内容的开发仍在继续。最终更新「Monument of Triumph」于6月9日推出。

paragraphs.en: It's been a tough pill to swallow, and one that's resulted in Destiny fans signing petitions and flooding livestream chats , seemingly to no avail. Everett is one of many who saw fans flock to Destiny 2's aid in its final days but, for her, it's hard not to imagine the outcome if the cavalry had shown up sooner.
paragraphs.cn: 这是一个难以吞咽的苦果，导致《命运》粉丝纷纷签署请愿书、涌入直播聊天，但似乎毫无效果。Everett和许多人一样，看到粉丝们在《命运2》的最后日子里涌来支援，但对她来说，很难不去想如果这股支援来得更早，结果又会如何。

paragraphs.en: "I think what's unfortunate and sad is they announced this was happening, and suddenly people are showing all this support for them," she added. "They've been getting a lot of negativity for all this time, and it's like, where was all this love? People need to put the hate away and show the love, because they could have really used that. I know it was there, but it wasn't as vocal as maybe some of the negativity."
paragraphs.cn: 「我认为不幸和悲哀的是，他们一宣布这件事，人们就突然都跑来支持，」她补充道，「他们这么长时间一直受到大量负面评价，就好像，那些爱当初都去哪了？人们需要收起仇恨，展现爱意，因为他们本可以真的需要这些支持。我知道支持是存在的，但它不像某些负面声音那么响亮。」

paragraphs.en: Other members of Digital Extremes have already offered their thoughts on the end of Destiny 2 support. Warframe creative director and Lotus actor Rebecca Ford was one of the first to share appreciation for Bungie's impact, calling Destiny a "force of nature" and adding that "there is no Warframe without the legacy of Bungie games."
paragraphs.cn: Digital Extremes的其他成员已经就《命运2》停止支持表达了他们的看法。《星际战甲》创意总监兼Lotus配音演员Rebecca Ford是最早对Bungie的影响表达感谢的人之一，她称《命运》是一股「自然的力量」，并补充说「没有Bungie游戏的传承，就没有《星际战甲》。」

paragraphs.en: Everett said that the community team has seen comparisons between Warframe and Destiny "almost every single day." The die-hard players who have logged hundreds – if not thousands – of hours into each game will tell you that the two have less in common than many would think. They each have their own strengths and have been appreciated by different players for different reasons.
paragraphs.cn: Everett说，社区团队「几乎每一天」都会看到人们拿《星际战甲》和《命运》做比较。那些在每款游戏中都投入了数百甚至数千小时的死忠玩家会告诉你，两者的共同点其实比很多人想象的要少。它们各有长处，也被不同的玩家因不同的理由而喜爱。

paragraphs.en: Now, as the competition dies down, Everett says she would "never say what has happened to Destiny is a good thing." For Digital Extremes, the existence of a competitor as towering as Destiny seems to have only helped Warframe grow.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，随着竞争减弱，Everett表示她「绝不会说发生在《命运》身上的事是件好事」。对Digital Extremes来说，存在《命运》这样强大的竞争对手，似乎只帮助了《星际战甲》成长。

paragraphs.en: "I think having games that are similar enough that the communities can come together and talk about both games, and maybe educate people on those games so people go to both, that's not a bad thing," she added. "I've said for forever, I never expect anyone to only play Warframe. You would burn out so fast if you did. So having other games that scratch a similar itch is healthy for our genre. Having Destiny was healthy for us."
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得有足够相似的游戏，能让社区聚在一起同时聊这两款，也许还能让更多人了解它们、从而两者都玩，这不是坏事，」她补充道，「我一直都在说，我从不指望任何人只玩《星际战甲》。如果只玩它，你很快就会倦怠。所以有其他游戏能带来类似的满足感，对我们的游戏类型是健康的。有《命运》对我们是健康的。」

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read what IGN learned when we caught up with the Warframe team to talk more about its latest update, Jade Shadows: Constellations. You can also see how Destiny 2 players did their best to crash servers with the launch of Monument of Triumph .
paragraphs.cn: 更多信息，你可以阅读IGN此前与《星际战甲》团队聊起最新更新「Jade Shadows: Constellations」时的报道。你还可以看到《命运2》玩家是如何在「胜利纪念碑」上线时竭力挤崩服务器的。
